reviews.author: Ahmad Rizal
reviews.text: Best custom parts workshop in Malaysia. Exhaust sounds incredible and the finish quality is unmatched.

reviews.author: Faiz Othman
reviews.text: Best custom parts workshop in Malaysia. The guys know their stuff and are passionate about motorcycles.

reviews.author: Hakim Roslan
reviews.text: Ordered a fender eliminator — arrived fast, fit perfectly. Will be back for the full exhaust system.

reviews.author: Darren Lim
reviews.text: Great product quality. Took a week longer than expected but worth every ringgit.

reviews.author: Priya Menon
reviews.text: Custom exhaust sounds amazing. Definitely one of the best workshops in KL.
